subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! To ‘Abdu’l-Baha, homelessness is home and the gloomy prison his nest
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی عبدالبهاء را خانه و کاشانه بی سر و سامانیست و لانه و آشیانه زندان
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
